params.name: text
params.description: Text to use within the link skip component. Defaults to `Skip to main content` if you do not provide a value.

params.name: href
params.description: The value of the link skip component’s `href` attribute. Defaults to `#maincontent` if you do not provide a value.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the link skip.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the link skip.
